properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v2 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Arise, arise Can you feel the fire Rising up higher Higher, higher Arise, arise Darkness can't stand by Cause the light is getting brighter Brighter, brighter

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And when we hear the trumpet sound And the four winds blow We will be the ones found Looking up ready to go In the twinkling of an eye We will be raised high Every heart beating in time With Adonai

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Awake, Awake Sleeping giant Open your eyes, it's time To rise and shine Awake, Awake Sleeping giant Open your eyes, it's time Dry bones come alive

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Revive, revive Breathe the breath of life Let it fill you with power Power, power Revive, revive Heed His voice be wise Ready for the final hour Hour, hour

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy, holy is the one Who was and is and is to come Oh, Holy, holy Holy, holy is the one Who was and is and is to come Oh, Holy, holy

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Awake, Awake Sleeping giant Open your eyes, it's time To rise and shine Awake, Awake And open your eyes Dry bones come alive
